subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling of the divine garden! Through the bounties of the clouds of the Covenant, become verdant and flourishing, and yield the fruit of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بوستان الهی از فیض غمام میثاق سبز و خرم شو و ثمر ثبوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
